title: The Rich God Episode 12 indonesia, english Sub
description:
English

The financial genius Wang Ke was accidentally sent to Shenzhou Star by the Holy Sword. Relying on the family-inherited Immortal Divine Skills, he experienced ups and downs to join the Immortal Faction. He thought he would make a lot of money, but he couldn't help but have to get involved in the turmoil of the two factions of righteousness and evil. Relying on his talent and intelligence, Wang Ke took every step to win the favor of beautiful women, build a business empire, Step by step set himself on the path to eliminate demons step by step, and finally became the Immortal God King!

Indonesia

Jenius keuangan Wang Ke secara tidak sengaja dikirim ke Bintang Shenzhou oleh Pedang Suci. Mengandalkan Keterampilan Ilahi Abadi yang diwariskan keluarga, dia mengalami pasang surut untuk bergabung dengan Faksi Immortal. Dia pikir dia akan menghasilkan banyak uang, tetapi dia mau tidak mau harus terlibat gejolak dua faksi kebenaran dan kejahatan. Mengandalkan bakat dan kecerdasannya, Wang Ke mengambil setiap langkah untuk memenangkan hati wanita cantik, membangun kerajaan bisnis, Selangkah demi selangkah menetapkan diri pada jalan untukmelenyapkan iblis selangkah demi selangkah, dan akhirnya menjadi Raja Dewa Abadi!

The Rich God Subtitle indonesia, english, portuguese, turkish, spanish, italian, polish, arabic, thai, german
